title: Making plans with a friend
canDo: I can invite a friend out, arrange a time, and politely change a plan.

chunks.text: What are you up to this weekend?
chunks.example: Hey, what are you up to this weekend?

chunks.text: Do you fancy grabbing a coffee?
chunks.example: Do you fancy grabbing a coffee after work?
I'm free on Saturday afternoon, if that works.
Let's meet around noon at the usual place.

chunks.text: Something came up — can we reschedule?
chunks.use: Politely move or cancel a plan.
chunks.example: Sorry, something came up — can we reschedule?

chunks.text: Can I take a rain check?
chunks.use: Politely decline now but suggest another time.
chunks.example: I can't tonight — can I take a rain check?

examples: What are you doing this weekend?

reading.passage: Maya texts her friend: "Hey, what are you up to this weekend? I'm meeting a few people on Saturday. Do you fancy grabbing a coffee first? I'm free on Saturday afternoon." Liam replies: "Sounds good! Let's meet around noon." An hour later he writes again: "Sorry, something came up — can we reschedule?"

script.t: Hey! What are you up to this weekend?
Not much. Do you fancy grabbing a coffee?
Sure! I'm free on Saturday afternoon.

gist.q: What do they agree to do?

fluency432.prompt: Tell me about your typical weekend. Say it once with no rush, then again a little faster, then once more — smooth and confident.

retell.prompt: Retell Maya and Liam's chat in your own words.

task.prompt: Invite a friend to do something this weekend, suggest a time, then change the plan politely.

writing.model: Hi Sam! What are you up to this weekend? Do you fancy grabbing a coffee? I'm free on Saturday afternoon — let's meet around noon. Talk soon, Alex

sentenceCombining.answer: I'm free on Saturday, so let's meet around noon.
Something came up, so I can't meet today.

task.prompt: Write a short message inviting a friend out this weekend. Suggest a time and a place.

quiz.q: You want to ask a friend about their weekend plans.
options: What are you up to this weekend?
Can I take a rain check?

quiz.q: You can't make it and want to move the plan.
options: Something came up — can we reschedule?
Do you fancy grabbing a coffee?
